---
applyTo: "assignments/**/*.md"
---

This instruction file applies to assignment README files under `assignments/**`.

Assignment README files should follow the template defined in `templates/assignment-template.md`:
- `# рЯУШ Assignment: <Assignment Name>`
- `## рЯОѓ Objective`
- `## рЯУЭ Tasks`
- `### рЯЫ†пЄП <Task Title>`
- `#### Description`
- `#### Requirements`

Use a student-friendly tone, keep requirements explicit, and include any starter-code or data resources if the assignment needs them.
